note: User-provided GSC data. Trust live dashboard over cached reports.

summary.total_pages_indexable: ~768 (125 calcs + 103 blogs + 3 geo + ~505 clean tools + 2 scenarios + 35 compare + 125 guides + 17 static + 15 decision + 1 widget)

issue_1.name: Discovered — currently not indexed

old_scenario_urls.description: Hash-ID scenario pages from V2 prune (2,006 removed May 27). ALL noindexed except 2 with GSC impressions. These were previously in the scenario sitemap (now at 0 URLs) so Google discovered them via sitemap crawl. Expected to linger in 'Discovered' for weeks.
old_scenario_urls.action: NONE — expected cleanup lag. Noindex tags + removal from sitemap will eventually clear these.

noindexed_geo_urls.description: City-specific calculator pages (99 cities × 6 calcs). 591 noindexed except 3 with GSC impressions. Discovered during crawl of sitemap (before V2 Phase 3 cleanup).
noindexed_geo_urls.action: NONE — expected cleanup lag. Already noindexed and removed from sitemap.

noindexed_formula_tool_variants.description: Formula tool variants (loan-20k-5yr-8pct patterns) that are noindexed + canonicalized to parent calculator. Excluded from sitemap since Phase 3.
noindexed_formula_tool_variants.action: NONE — expected cleanup lag. Noindex + canonical tags will eventually signal Google.

valuable_clean_sitemap_urls.description: Clean indexable pages in sitemap that Google hasn't crawled yet. Includes ~500+ clean tool variants, ~125 guides, ~35 comparisons, ~15 decision pages, widget page. Young domain — crawl budget is limited.
sample_urls: Decision pages like /decision/* (15 pages, all index,follow)
valuable_clean_sitemap_urls.action: NONE urgent. Prioritize internal linking from high-authority calcs to valuable pages. Decision pages and widget page are well-linked from 16 calculator hubs. Natural crawl discovery will pick them up.

issue_1.verdict: EXPECTED CLEANUP LAG. 90%+ are old noindexed URLs from V2 prune. Do not panic. Do not use Indexing API for normal pages. Continue internal linking strategy.

issue_2.name: Crawled — currently not indexed
issue_2.note: Cannot list exact URLs without GSC API access. User should export these from GSC dashboard.
likely_urls: Scenarios with GSC impressions but thin content (e.g., retirement-planning-5c0e8e25 which IS noindexed)
Formula variants with GSC impressions (afford-100k-40k-6-5pct, afford-130k-40k-7pct — these are indexable, may need stronger internal links)
Geo pages with GSC impressions (loan/nashville-tn, loan/reno-nv, tax/philadelphia-pa)
Thin blog posts or automatically generated pages that Google crawled but deemed low quality

recommended_actions.valuable_pages_crawled_not_indexed: Identify which of the 15 are valuable (in sitemap, index,follow, good content). Add more internal links from high-authority calculator hubs. Ensure no duplicate content issues.
recommended_actions.low_value_pages_crawled_not_indexed: If noindexed by V2 rules, this is correct behavior — Google crawled and honored noindex. No action needed.
recommended_actions.borderline_pages: If page has some GSC impressions but is thin, consider improving content or accept it won't index.

issue_2.verdict: User should export the 15 URLs from GSC and classify each. ~5-8 likely valuable (decision pages, widget page, blog posts). ~7-10 likely V2-noindexed pages crawling through.

issue_3.name: Alternative page with proper canonical tag
issue_3.description: Google found pages with canonical tags pointing to a different URL, indicating the canonical target is the correct one.
likely_urls: Formula tool variants canonicalized to parent calculator (e.g., /tools/loan-20k-5yr-8pct → /calculators/loan-calculator)
Tool variant pages where the parent-page canonical is working correctly
issue_3.action: VERIFY canonical targets are correct. If the 4 URLs are formula variants pointing to parent calculators, this is EXPECTED and CORRECT behavior. If any are unexpected, investigate the canonical tag on that page.
issue_3.verdict: Probably correct — V2 canonical strategy working as designed.

issue_4.name: Page with redirect
issue_4.description: Google encountered a page that redirects to another URL.
issue_4.action: Identify the URL from GSC. Common causes: www→non-www redirect, HTTP→HTTPS, or a specific page-level redirect. If www→HTTPS, this is normal. If an old page redirects to a new URL, confirm the redirect target is intentional.
issue_4.verdict: Likely normal redirect (www or HTTP→HTTPS). Verify in GSC dashboard.

issue_5.name: Duplicate, Google chose different canonical
issue_5.description: Google found duplicate content and chose a different canonical URL than the one specified.
issue_5.action: Identify which URL from GSC. Likely a tool variant that has very similar content to another variant. If Google's chosen canonical is reasonable (e.g., pointing to parent calculator), accept it. If Google chose a wrong canonical, add stronger differentiation signals (unique FAQ, unique example, unique case study) to the page.
issue_5.verdict: One case — investigate in GSC. If Google's choice is acceptable, no action. If wrong, add content differentiation.

risky_automations_status.status: ALL CONFIRMED PAUSED — no risky automations active

next_steps_after_phase_11_5_deploy: Wait 1-2 days for new news-sitemap.xml to be crawled by Google
Check GSC → Sitemaps → news-sitemap.xml for status change from 'Couldn't fetch' to 'Success'
Export the 15 'Crawled — currently not indexed' URLs from GSC for manual classification
Export the 4 'Alternative page with proper canonical' URLs to verify canonical targets
Export the 1 'Page with redirect' URL to confirm redirect target
Export the 1 'Duplicate, Google chose different canonical' URL to assess Google's choice
Monitor 'Discovered — currently not indexed' count over 2-4 weeks (should gradually decrease as Google processes noindex tags)
DO NOT re-enable any paused automations
DO NOT use Google Indexing API for normal QFINHUB pages
